test.summary: All 156 tests passed across 12 test suites covering contract tests, integration tests, verification tests, and error handling.

typecheck.summary: No typecheck configured for JavaScript project.

lint.summary: No linter configured for this project.

appliedUpdates.description: Document effective pattern for testing OCR functionality using small base64-encoded test images (1x1 PNG placeholders) to avoid requiring actual image files or external dependencies.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Implement image size validation with reasonable limits (e.g., 20MB) for base64 image uploads, rejecting oversized images with HTTP 400 to prevent abuse and ensure system stability.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature screenshot-image-handling added validateImageSize function with MAX_IMAGE_SIZE_BYTES constant (20MB limit), which is a good security pattern for handling base64 uploads.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document mock mode testing pattern: When implementing features that require different response scenarios (e.g., confidence levels), use exact question text matching in mock mode to simulate different outcomes. This is pragmatic but should be documented as it's fragile if test questions change.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature screenshot-image-handling used exact string matching (questionLower === 'solve this equation') to determine confidence levels for different test scenarios in mock mode.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed backend-worker skill TDD procedure
No new services or commands were added to services.yaml
